module.name: Incoming Mail Demo
module.author: System
module.description: Demonstrates incoming email processing. Scans every 5 minutes for emails containing {Test0000}, sends a notification email, logs activity in a module table, and marks the email as processed.

scripts.script:
# Incoming Mail Demo — process-test-emails # Scans incoming_emails for unprocessed emails containing {Test0000} # Sends notification email, logs to module table, marks processed MODULE_SLUG = 'incoming-mail-demo' TABLE_NAME = 'IncomingMailDemoLog' # Create module log table if not exists table = DynamicModel.get_or_create(TABLE_NAME, { 'incoming_email_id': Integer, 'subject': String(500), 'from_address': String(500), 'action': String(100), 'processed_at': DateTime, }) # Find unprocessed emails with {Test0000} result = db.session.execute(db.text(""" SELECT id, subject, from_address, body_text, body_html FROM incoming_emails WHERE processed = 0 AND (subject LIKE '%{Test0000}%' OR body_text LIKE '%{Test0000}%' OR body_html LIKE '%{Test0000}%') ORDER BY created_at ASC """)) count = 0 for row in result.fetchall(): email_id = row[0] subject = row[1] or '(no subject)' from_addr = row[2] or 'unknown' body_text = row[3] or '' body_html = row[4] or '' # Send notification email email_body = ( '

Test Email Processed

' '

From: ' + from_addr + '
' 'Subject: ' + subject + '
' 'Email ID: #' + str(email_id) + '

' '
' + body_text[:2000] + '
' ) try: send_email( to='test@test.com', subject='[Incoming Mail Demo] ' + subject[:80], body=email_body, html=True, ) except Exception as e: print('Email send failed: ' + str(e)) # Mark email as processed and claimed by this module db.session.execute(db.text(""" UPDATE incoming_emails SET processed = 1, module_slug = :slug, processed_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = :eid """), {'slug': MODULE_SLUG, 'eid': email_id}) # Log to module table log_entry = table.insert().values( incoming_email_id=email_id, subject=subject, from_address=from_addr, action='processed_{Test0000}', processed_at=datetime.now(timezone.utc), ) db.session.execute(log_entry) count += 1 db.session.commit() print('Processed {} incoming test email(s)'.format(count))
